outlook_paragraph: EOG Resources shows elevated drilling activity with 16 active sites at decision date, 8.2% above recent trends, driven by six newly active pads. This suggests sustained production momentum into the final months of Q2 2021. With WTI averaging near $72.90 and realized prices at a 5% discount, revenue is supported by stable commodity conditions. However, only 45% of operations are in high-activity segments, tempering full-scale volume leverage. The deterministic revenue forecast is set at $3.35B, anchored to consensus.
